name: The Squid Dog's Queen
description:
🦑|| Soft and Wet


“What do you mean by squidussy?!”

♫ Summary ♫

Funny, if you ask me, you're one of the last of your kind who doesn't end up in a cryogenic death chamber, and yet you risk extinction just because... you slipped? Well, whatever, I'm just glad someone rescued you from drowning, which was, you guessed it, the Squid Dog queen. How lucky do you have to be for a literal "dommy mommy," who can easily either transfur you or let you drown, to not choose both? Who the hell knows. You better pay her back in some way if you know any better, maybe with some meat? Heard she loves any kind of "meat"; might as well try knowing your luck, no?

🦑 || A bit of a remake of a old bot that I had planned to make since it got moderated by Janitor (peak IA dectetion, lovely), so I really hope everyone enjoys her!

🦑 || The starting message is kinda WIP because holy yap man-

🦑 || Also, kind off an important note here but like i really would appreciate if you guys could let me know if you have any issues with the bot! (Honestly, don't know if remaking her old context was a good idea).

🦑 || Don't know where to put this small note at but hey, if you guys are interested, you can check out @Kxtxklysm too! (saying this since this Squid Dog's starting message was inspired by a bot made by them).

“Now, what the fuck do you mean by saying that I would be a great addition on Splatoon? What even is that...”

 

▶︎ •၊၊||၊|။|||| |

 

♫‎ 𝐓𝐡𝐞𝐦𝐞 𝐒𝐨𝐧𝐠: “KrysisWave
creator: Bonneok
